purpose: Frozen study facts constrain task framing but never replace measured benchmark artifacts.

anchors.study: Replogle et al. 2022 K562 essential-gene CRISPRi screen
anchors.study_fact: The registered artifact is a large single-cell CRISPRi expression atlas with perturbation labels; the benchmark artifact does not include a split-scoped raw cell-by-guide count matrix.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: observed design facts and target-level derived responses

anchors.study_fact: Perturbation response structure can recover known functional organization, while new clusters remain hypotheses rather than validated complexes or mechanisms.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: derived response structure and candidate follow-up

anchors.study: Papalexi et al. THP-1 ECCITE-seq screen
anchors.study_fact: RNA, guide, protein, and hashing modalities require exact cell alignment; guide-count evidence supports assignment and ambient-signal analysis.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: measured modality QC and derived retained-cell decisions

anchors.study_fact: The study asks which perturbations alter checkpoint-related responses; cis target efficacy, responder state, trans differential expression, and global response are distinct estimands.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: measured or derived associations with artifact-specific uncertainty

anchors.study: Norman et al. 2019 combinatorial CRISPRa screen
anchors.study_fact: Perturbations are intended combinatorial constructs; multiple guides are not by themselves evidence of a transcriptomic doublet.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: observed construct design and derived retention decisions

anchors.study_fact: Combination response structure supports candidate interaction hypotheses, but a multi-guide label or response cluster alone does not establish a causal genetic mechanism.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: derived programs and candidate genetic-interaction hypotheses

anchors.study: Kang et al. donor-replicated stimulation scRNA-seq
anchors.study_fact: Donors are independent units for condition contrasts; cells are subsamples. Composition analysis requires observed state labels and excludes missing labels.
anchors.allowed_claim_level: supplemental donor-aware expression and composition associations

anchors.study_fact: Prediction evaluation is configured only when a frozen manifest is present and leakage checks pass.
